## Ask What to Expect

Ask our AI for answers you can trust – powered by What to Expect’s expert-backed content. Currently in Beta.

[![search-icon](https://images.agoramedia.com/wte3.0/gcms/AI-Search.svg)](https://www.whattoexpect.com/pregnancy/birth-plan/doula-vs-midwife#)

This AI tool provides general information only, not medical advice. Responses may be inaccurate and shouldn’t replace your healthcare provider. By using this search, you agree to the [Ask What to Expect Disclaimer](https://www.whattoexpect.com/ai-search-disclaimer), [Privacy Policy](https://www.whattoexpect.com/privacy-policy), and [Terms of Use](https://www.whattoexpect.com/terms-of-use/).


How this tool works

Ask What to Expect is intended to help you perform searches on the What to Expect website. It is not meant to perform any other type of search.

**Don’t share personal, sensitive, or health information**

Be sure not to share personal, sensitive, or health information, since the AI Search Assistant collects and stores input and output text, which may be reviewed to improve its accuracy and the services.

**Check your search results**

Ask What to Expect provides AI-generated responses. While we always strive for accuracy, we can’t guarantee search results. Ask What to Expect results are not medical or health advice.
